caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with several framed pictures on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and grey pants in the background. Clothing racks filled with various garments are also visible. In the lower left and lower right of the scene, there are red and white logos; the one on the left contains the word "SMILE" and the one on the right contains the words "SMILE" and "tot". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, subtly shifting his facial expressions and mouth movements as he speaks, while the background and equipment remain stationary.
